import React, { Component } from "react"; import { TabLink, Tabs, TabContent } from "react-tabs-redux"; import { Grid, Paper, Box,Card,CardContent,CardMedia,Typography } from "@material-ui/core"; import { makeStyles } from "@material-ui/core/styles"; import { sizing } from "@material-ui/system"; class Interests extends Component { interest1 = ( <> sdf ); render() { return (
StarLink Car AutoPilot Sports {this.interest1} .sdf.. sdf...
); } } export default Interests;
